BeiLuo — Top 8 Electronic Component Distributor in China, Infineon Authorized Since 2013

BeiLuo provides authorized Infineon components including MCU, IGBT, MOSFET, and sensors with deep Infineon stock, same-day quotation, and dedicated FAE technical support for industrial and automotive engineers worldwide.

Top 8 Electronic Component Distributor in China
FAE Technical Support Team

Why Choose BeiLuo as Your Infineon Distributor

Deep Infineon Inventory

BeiLuo maintains over 10,000 Infineon part numbers in bonded warehouse stock, enabling fast fulfillment for production-scale orders with full lot traceability and certificate of conformance.

FAE Technical Support

Our field application engineers provide hands-on design review, component selection guidance, and reference code to accelerate your time to market with Infineon products.

Genuine Authorized Stock

Every Infineon component BeiLuo distributes is sourced directly through authorized channels with complete date-code documentation and anti-counterfeit verification.

Fast Global Delivery

BeiLuo ships to customers in over 40 countries via DHL, FedEx, and UPS express, typically delivering within 3 to 5 business days after quotation confirmation.

Infineon Product Categories

Browse our in-stock Infineon components

MCU

Infineon MCU portfolio including AURIX TC3xx automotive safety MCUs, XMC4000 industrial motor control MCUs, and PSoC 6 IoT devices - all in verified BeiLuo stock.

IGBT

Infineon IGBT H3 and H4 trench-field-stop devices for solar inverters, UPS, and variable-frequency drives, stocked across TO-247, HSOF, and module package formats.

MOSFET

Infineon MOSFET lineup spanning OptiMOS, CoolMOS, and StrongIRFET families from 20 V to 950 V for power conversion and motor drive applications.

Sensors

Infineon Sensors spanning Hall-effect, pressure, and current-sensing families including TLE speed sensors, DPS310 barometric sensors, and XENSIV radar for automotive and industrial IoT.

View All Products

Application Solutions

Motor Drive

BLDC Motor Drive Solution

Infineon IGBT-based three-phase BLDC motor drive solution covering power stage design, gate drive isolation, and field-oriented control for industrial servo and HVAC compressor applications, sourced from BeiLuo.

EV Charging

EV On-Board Charger Solution

High-efficiency EV on-board charger solution using Infineon OptiMOS MOSFETs for totem-pole PFC and phase-shifted full-bridge DC-DC conversion, sourced from BeiLuo.

Industrial Automation

Industrial IoT Sensor Node

Infineon DPS310 and TLI4966G sensor node solution for real-time environmental monitoring and rotating machine health tracking in Industry 4.0 factory automation, sourced from BeiLuo.

View All Solutions

Technical Support & Guides

Selection Guides

How to Select the Right Infineon IGBT for Your Inverter Design

Step-by-step guide covering voltage class, switching frequency range, package selection, and thermal design for Infineon H3 and H4 IGBT families.

2024-06-10
New Product Reviews

Infineon AURIX vs XMC MCU Review: A Comparison for Industrial Applications

FAE review comparing AURIX TC3xx and XMC4000 series across safety certification, peripheral set, and development toolchain for industrial embedded designs.

2024-05-22
Application Notes

Infineon Sensors in Industrial IoT Applications: A Practical Application Note

Infineon XENSIV sensors enable precision measurement of current, position, pressure, and magnetic field in industrial IoT and automotive designs. Covers sensor selection, interface design, and calibration strategies.

2024-06-05
